goalDrawer.title: Set Goal
goalDrawer.dateError: End date must be after the start date

setNotification.title: Goal set!
setNotification.body: Your goal runs from {{start}} to {{end}} — that's {{days}} days to cover {{distance}} km, averaging {{perDay}} km/day. Keep an eye on the pace to stay on track.

resetNotification.title: Goal cleared
resetNotification.body: Your goal has been removed, so your runs are no longer measured against a daily target. Set a new goal any time to start tracking progress again.

resetData.title: Danger Zone
resetData.description: Permanently delete all your runs, goal, and settings. This cannot be undone.
resetData.confirmMessage: This will permanently delete all runs, your goal, and your settings. This action cannot be undone.

notification.title: App data reset
notification.body: All your data has been deleted. The app will reload now.

home.title: Welcome to Running Tracker
home.subtitle: Track your runs and reach your goals.

log.title: Run Log
log.empty: Your tracked running events will appear here.

notFound.message: The page you were looking for does not exist.
